American actor and singer Josh Groban hands over his phone for Celebrity Send to All to have an embarrassing message sent to all his recorded contacts, and Michael makes unsuspecting fans' dreams come true in Unexpected Star, while also heading to Newport to wake up another member of the public to play The Midnight Gameshow

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: The guys have people test drinks that may cause bizarre side-effects, before hitting the gym. The losing Joker is put through many indignities in Rob Riggle's murder mystery

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Sal, Q, and Murr slather on the charm for a film shoot for a commercial before focusing on delivering some hard truths

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is shocked to discover his father let him win a game of table tennis when he was 12, and indignantly demands a rematch, determined to secure a legitimate victory this time. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is angry to learn Ray threw a party in her house 20 years previously, and responds by spurning him in favour of Robert. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Doris Roberts and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert and Ray are asked to film a video tribute to Frank, who has been named Man of the Year at his lodge, but find none of the other members can stand him

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank is injured just before going on a Caribbean cruise with Marie, so Ray takes his place, sharing a tiny cabin with his mother and being mistaken for her lover. Meanwhile, Robert faces up to the challenge of looking after Frank. Comedy, starring Ray Romano, Peter Boyle and Doris Roberts

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra takes Ally and the twins to her parents' house, leaving Ray at home by himself - and he finds it impossible to get to sleep. American comedy, starring Ray Romano, Patricia Heaton and Peter Boyle

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: A desperate Ray does everything he can to get to the front of the queue to meet the New York Mets 1969 team at the National Baseball Hall of Fame. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandler's father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monica's relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Inappropriate Sister
programme.desc: Ross struggles to come to terms with life as one of the unemployed, and turns to Joey for advice. Rachel is disturbed by her new boyfriend's uncomfortably close relationship with his sister. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joey's help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Year's Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandler's Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her biological father for the first time and Rachel helps Joey look a little more sophisticated with the addition of a trendy shoulder bag - which everyone else mistakes for a women's handbag

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica's relationship finally becomes public knowledge to all but Ross, who is starting to get his life back on track by renting a flat opposite the girls. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Ross makes a bad impression on his new neighbours, and Monica piles the pressure on Chandler, demanding more commitment than he feels able to give. Joey's latest girlfriend proves a little too fiery - but he is afraid to end their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey wonders why he has started dreaming about dating Monica, while Phoebe finds a police badge at Central Perk and decides to take the law into her own hands

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachel's Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel is interviewed for her dream job, but makes the mistake of inadvertently kissing her prospective employer. Meanwhile, Monica competes with Phoebe in the relationship stakes

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel starts taking regular cigarette breaks to ingratiate herself with new boss Kim and colleague Nancy, even though she does not smoke, while Joey competes with Ross's son for a role in a TV commercial. Comedy, guest starring Joanna Gleason (Boogie Nights)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Can't Flirt
programme.desc: Joey tells everyone about his upcoming TV appearance, little anticipating the surprise awaiting him, and Ross flirts with a pizza-delivery woman, but leaves her decidedly unimpressed

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a ride in a police car, until the sound of a gunshot causes them to fear for their lives. Meanwhile, Rachel accidentally listens to a telephone message to Ross from Emily. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Gary plans to ask her to move in with him, but fears it is too early in their relationship for such a commitment, and asks Chandler to help her change his mind. While the rest of the gang become obsessed with playing a game of catch. Guest starring Michael Rapaport, with Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joey's Big Break
programme.desc: Joey turns up in Las Vegas to start filming his first movie role, only to receive disappointing news. Phoebe racks her brains to remember why she hates Ross so much

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The pals visit Las Vegas, where they find surprises galore awaiting them. Meanwhile, Ross misinterprets Rachel's intentions and embarks on a campaign of public humiliation against her - but discovers she is more than a match for him

programme.title: Private Benjamin (1980)
programme.desc: A scatterbrained society woman looks for a change of pace after her husband dies on their wedding night, and is tricked by a duplicitous recruiter into enlisting in the army. In spite of the initial culture shock and conflict with her tough commanding officer, she gradually finds direction and self-esteem for the first time in her life. Upon completion of basic training, she meets a dashing French doctor, who is in Biloxi for a medical conference. They part ways after a brief romance but it is not long before she must decide between her Army career or love. Comedy, starring Goldie Hawn, Armand Assante, Eileen Brennan, Harry Dean Stanton, Sam Wanamaker and Barbara Barrie

programme.title: Jimmy Carr's Am I the A**hole?
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr, GK Barry and Jamali Maddix pass judgement on a man who helps himself to his co-workers' lunches, and gives their oppinions on adoption disputes

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: A bizarre Scenes from a Hat sets up a plastic surgery hoedown and songs from Aisha: The Musical, while Jeff Davis chooses from a munchkin bully, a blind gondolier and Chicken Man

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: An extended edition of the irreverent panel show first shown during the Queen's Diamond Jubilee in 2012. Jimmy Carr hosts alongside regular team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson, plus guests Sarah Millican, Miles Jupp, Chris Kamara and Jennie Bond

programme.title: Whose Line Is It Anyway? USA
programme.desc: Colin Mochrie brings sexiness, catwalk models and Spanish game shows to an FBI gun range scene in Hollywood Director and there is an exciting Indiana Jones-themed scene

programme.title: South Park
programme.sub-title: Big Gay Al's Big Gay Boat Ride
programme.desc: Stan's preoccupation with his dog's sexuality jeopardises South Park's chances of winning a homecoming game. Adult animation, featuring the voice of George Clooney

programme.title: South Park
programme.sub-title: An Elephant Makes Love to a Pig
programme.desc: Kyle receives an elephant by mail order from Africa, but his new pet is too big to keep in the house. Cartman gloats that he has a pig which is small enough to have at home, so the pair set about genetically engineering a cross-breed out of the two animals

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: Stan's grandfather begs him for help in committing suicide, and Kyle's mother lays down the law by banning an offensive TV show. With the voices of Trey Parker and Matt Stone

programme.title: Kevin Bridges: A Whole Different Story
programme.desc: The comedian on stage at Glasgow's SSE Hydro during his 2015 stand-up tour. He entertains 12,000 fans with his thoughts on economic theory, art history and diet tips, as well as politics and the Scottish referendum. He also deals with the rigours of growing up and adapting to his new-found place in the world - coupled with the added novelty of having money for the first time

programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The American comedy returns after a mid-series break. Elsewhere, Claire and Phil attempt to split the bill with cheque-dodging friends on a double date, and Haley, Alex and Luke run into Goodfellas star Ray Liotta while searching for a last-minute birthday surprise for Mitchell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone heads to Jay and Gloria's when a huge storm causes a power cut, although so many people in such close quarters can only spell trouble

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire manages to easily balance running Jay's closet business with her domestic tasks, but she might be exploiting a secret weapon. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam are snubbed at their friends' wedding, leaving them to wonder what they might have done to deserve such rude treatment. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simon Cowell provides the voice of the sharp-tongued administrator of a nursery for gifted children who has the job of deciding whether to accept Maggie. As the possibility of successful admission becomes more likely, Lisa feels her position as the intelligent one in the family is being threatened

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Reviews of The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne, Mammals, You Won't Believe This and Help! My House Is Haunted

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 22-year-old transgender woman Amira, and Andy, a rugby player from Coventry, take part

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dental nurse Jade, who's 25, is set up on a date with handsome tree surgeon Tom. Meanwhile, Sharran - the UK's only female sumo wrestler - meets David, a former bingo-caller, who has been unlucky in love in the past, and City trader Adam is set up on a date with 28-year-old party girl Leena from Liverpool

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The tattoo artists try to help a woman whose mid-life crisis led to body ink that she hates, and a personal trainer with a 'best friends' tattoo that is no longer accurate. Plus, a woman who wants a lasting memorial for her late father, and Sketch designs a nightmare zombie-sloth for a horror-loving couple

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Babatunde Aléshé knows what a rocket is, Emma Sidi can swear, Jack Dee closely resembles a world-famous artist, Rosie Jones enjoys cheating and Andy Zaltzman refuses to be defeated in an argument over syntax. Greg Davies awards points, praise and pity, while Alex Horne has great fun keeping a record of everything for posterity

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Isy Suttie to go up against Jon Richardson and Richard Osman in the comedy words-and-numbers quiz. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Rick Forman, founder and CEO of New Jersey-based discount clothing store Forman Mills, goes incognito among his own staff posing as a contestant on a reality show. He plans to go undercover because he intends to double the number of stores in the next year and wants to make sure that all the outlets are doing well so that revenue doubles too

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jessica Herrin, the founder and CEO of direct sales company Stella & Dot, goes undercover. She pretends to be a reality show contestant to access the workforce and find out whether her original vision for the firm is still being carried out as the organisation grows

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Rosanne's husband died recently and now she wants to find a smaller home where she can get back into her art. The brothers must brush away uninspiring interiors and use their artistic licence to turn her suburban home into a masterpiece

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Former soldier Scott is firmly under the command of his partner Clare in the kitchen as they kick-off the competition in Lincolnshire, but neither food nor conversation topics impress picky diner Adele. On day two, good-lifers Su and Dylan serve up food from their own smallholding, including a pigeon who foolishly tried to eat their produce. An unusual combination of a pagan fireside ritual and a tribute to Gary Barlow round off the night. Finally, ex-army couple Adele and Dave attempt to recreate an officers' mess for their evening

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Keen to impress with their cooking in Brighton is long-married couple David and Liz, newlyweds James and Paul, and loved-up Martin and Lorena. David and Liz are hoping that their twist on crowd-pleasers and their playful approach to entertaining will clinch the cash prize. Day two sees creative Paul and his husband James pull out all the stops to create a very personal evening. Last to host are love's young dream Martin and Lorena who are determined to outdo the rest by bringing the fiesta with a Spanish-themed evening

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A man from Blackpool is given £12,000 to organise every detail of his nuptials. However, while Mike's bride Katie dreams of a ceremony fit for a Hollywood superstar, the groom refuses to use a mobile phone or the internet in his planning, and hopes to rely on local attractions to pull off this ideal wedding

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan Bones from Essex is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials and give his fiancee Nikki Bacon her perfect wedding. The couple met on a blind date two years earlier, but despite their fairytale romance, the groom's ideas for the ceremony may not live up to the bride's hopes for a pink, girly and fun event

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Jeff Young, co-owner of custom signs company Yesco, goes undercover wanting to ensure that each franchise location follows corporate protocol and is meeting the needs of its staff. He meets staff members who have suffered bereavements, heart attacks and homelessness but still remain dedicated to their jobs

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Scott Gerber, the chief executive of hospitality business the Gerber Group, goes undercover in his own company. As the business continues to expand, Scott wants to make sure it is maintaining the reputation that made it such a success. Along the way, he hears some home truths that are hard to handle

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Murphy's Historic Hotel near Sacramento in northern California, where owners Brian, Kevin and Joel are often too distracted by their lively bar to look after their business. The national landmark, which has played host to an array of famous names including Mark Twain, President Ulysses S Grant and JP Morgan, has no dedicated accommodation manager, so guests sometimes struggle to receive the attention they need and end up feeling the hotel has become an afterthought beside the noisy saloon

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Connecticut's oldest inn, the Curtis House in Woodbury, which has been owned by the Hardisty family for generations. However, the business has started to fall apart and their legacy is on the brink of being lost. Siblings Chris and TJ, who are in charge, no longer speak to each other and the staff and guests feel stuck in the middle

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary is forced far out of her comfort zone when the buyers head to Indio, California. Lockers in this desert town hold many treasures, but it remains to be seen who will buy them

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Ivy and Mary enter into an unusual alliance when the gang hits Koreatown, and Brandi steps into a classic 1980s movie when Jarrod finds a Tron costume

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Aberdeen, three rival couples compete to host the best dinner party. Nicola and her boyfriend Russell kick off the week, aiming to party their way to victory. The evening starts with a guest appearance from a goat, before Canadian Megan and her boyfriend Sean engage in a spot of leg wrestling. On day two, married couple Claire and Gerry host a more traditional evening, but the starter is Megan's worst fear - salmon. Nicola and Megan make a discovery in the bedroom that leads to a shocking revelation. On the final night, Megan and Sean host a Greek-themed evening, but their confusing menu has their guests guessing. Megan could be her own worst enemy when she fails to bite her tongue after her starter is criticised

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.sub-title: I'm a Girl Who Likes a Clean Line
programme.desc: Jack Dee takes a long riverside stroll, Andy Zaltzman risks two bites of a vegetable, Emma Sidi does some cartwheels, Babatunde Aléshé gets annoyed with a rocket and Rosie Jones menaces a member of the crew. Chief statistician Alex Horne dons a luminous hat and rings a bell while proceeding at a gentle pace, while Greg Davies awards points, praise and pity

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Vic Reeves and Aisling Bea join host Jimmy Carr and team captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson for more comic innuendos, unpredictable conundrums and unforgivable puns in the comedy quiz. David O'Doherty is with Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Continuing the third series of Robert Popper's award-winning comedy about the Goodmans' family gatherings. Dad has been secretly hiding a dead fox in the outside freezer as he wants to get it stuffed, but when Mum almost finds out, he enlists the help of Adam and Jonny to stash the carcass elsewhere. Tracy-Ann Oberman (best known for her role as Chrissie Watts in EastEnders) makes her third appearance as Aunty Val, starring alongside Simon Bird, Paul Ritter, Tamsin Greig, Tom Rosenthal and Mark Heap

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Continuing the third series of Robert Popper's award-winning comedy about the Goodmans' Friday night gatherings. The family is distraught when Grandma gets engaged to Mr Morris, her horrible 85-year-old boyfriend who upset everyone and lost his temper the first time he came for dinner in 2012. Dad couldn't stand him back then and hid in his shed, but will they get along this time? Meanwhile, Jim collects money for charity dressed in a dog costume that doesn't leave out any detail. Starring Simon Bird, Tom Rosenthal, Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter and Mark Heap, with Frances Cuka and Harry Landis

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark's plans for a productive week off are disrupted by the arrival of his sister - and he becomes annoyed as Jeremy develops a crush on her. The aspiring musician gets a taste of his own medicine, however, as his flatmate admits to having feelings for Big Suze. Robert Webb and David Mitchell star

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy is called up for jury service, but finds himself falling for the female defendant and ignores official advice about sleeping with her - even though it is against the law. Meanwhile, Mark visits a gay club with Sophie and her new friend

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The team attempts to fix holidaymaker Scott's manscaping stickmen, and also meet superfan Chelsea, who has an obsession with a cardiganed crooner

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Armando Montelongo, the CEO of a Texas property investment company, is worried that the firm's rapid growth means he no longer has any interaction with the staff at the heart of his business. So he goes undercover to work alongside them and find out whether the business is operating as efficiently as possible

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Butler, the founder of one of America's most successful bakeries, dons a disguise to go incognito among her employees, posing as a contestant on a reality show. Gina is heavily involved in the creation of every recipe for the cupcakes sold in her stores and is keen to ensure each franchise is consistent in meeting her perfectionist standards

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? Crystal and Jon are tired of suburbia and want to change their lifestyle by moving downtown with their two teenage daughters. But before they can start city-living, the brothers must hunt down a dreamy downsize. And the couple learn that it's easier said than done when working with tight margins

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Bournemouth are confident Nikki and Steve, who've been together for 20 years. Accountant Peter and retired flight attendant Lyn hope that their hosting experience and a surprise can secure them the win. Later, the youngest hosts in the group, Nicki and Emily, serve up a vegan menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Young Brighton couple Hannah and Luke kick off the competition with an ambitiously trendy menu, then more experienced hosts Karen and Mark step up to the plate the next day, followed by Rachel and TJ, who have given nothing away to their fellow hosts

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Adam is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to make up for past mistakes by giving his fiancee Lydia the wedding of her dreams. However, his history of reckless spending and determination to plan a lavish party do not bode well for the bride, who has her heart set on a church ceremony just like her mother's

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: A tattoo artist is given £12,000 to plan every detail of his nuptials, and hopes to incorporate his love of heavy metal into the day. However, his obsessively organised bride expects nothing less than the fairy-tale wedding of her dreams, complete with castles, sparkles and magical unicorns

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Bryon Stephens, the president and chief operating officer of Marco's Pizza, dons a disguise to work incognito with his employees - from delivery drivers to managers - so that he can assess how the organisation and its many franchises are faring.

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Greg Adler, the president and chief executive of off-road accessory empire 4 Wheel Parts, goes undercover in his own firm. Within five years, he hopes to turn the company into a billion-dollar business with more than 100 stores, and he intends to make sure that it continues to provide high standards of customer service as it grows.

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Pipestone, Minnesota, where he checks in to Historic Calumet Inn. Joint owners Vanda and Rina Smrkovski were given the hotel as a gift by their father, but after just nine months in charge, their staff are on the brink of revolt, and guests are expressing their dissatisfaction with the accommodation. Gordon quickly realises the sisters need to grow up fast if he's going to have a chance of saving the business

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Angler's Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Things get physical between Dan and Dave when the desert heat sets tempers on edge, while Ivy plays it cool bidding on a high-risk locker

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: A Santa Ana auction has the buyers hoping for a high-class score, while Jarrod and Ivy battle between buying sprees leaving the other bidders reeling

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete in Plymouth. The first hosts, Mena and her husband Chris, put together a locally sourced menu, and a boogie on the piano impresses their guests. Lovebirds Vicky and her boyfriend Chris host next, requesting everyone to come dressed as a famous couple. The final hosts are seafaring married couple Sarah and Chris, whose guests make a gallant effort with their costumes for a nautical evening

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: No naughty-bits-version. The headline news from this episode is that Greg Davies almost gags after opening a large jar - and the competition remains as close as ever. But it certainly is time for Andy Zaltzman to make a robot sing, and for a newly blond Jack Dee to discuss hedgehogs

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Dad has bought a piano, and the world's most sarcastic piano tuner (Liam O'Carroll) comes round to get the instrument into tip-top condition. Meanwhile, the Goodmans spot Aunty Val (Tracy-Ann Oberman) having an affair. What should they do about it? Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Tamsin Greig, Paul Ritter and Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: In a desperate move to prevent his relationship falling apart, Mark decides he must propose to Sophie. They embark on a romantic mini-break, but when Jeremy arrives at the same hotel, the flatmates end up stranded on the moors together

programme.desc: Mark and Sophie are engaged to be married, but the groom-to-be keeps having crippling doubts. programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The regular gaggle of family and friends share their thoughts on shows including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown, Family Fortunes, Mammals, Love Is Blind and This Morning

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on various show from the past week, including Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Jamie's £1 Wonders, Top Gear, Guillermo del Toro's Cabinet of Curiosities, Drink Masters, Wild Croc Territory, plus the woman marrying a ghost on This Morning and BBC News reporting on the-then new 50p coin. programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge remember the ups and downs of their marriage through a series of flashbacks, including the time they each began flirting with guests at a glamorous party - a situation that led to a food fight and an unexpected swim in the pool

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica join Adam and his friends Emmy, Dana and Chad on a treasure hunt inspired by the Goonies when Pops misplaces some family jewels and Beverly threatens to reorganise his financial affairs if he fails to find them. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin and Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray struggles to get Adam interested in hockey, but he doesn't enjoy the sport and fakes enthusiasm to please his father. Beverly tries to help Erica prepare for her college entrance exams, but her plans threaten to backfire when she does the job too well

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Danielle and Jordan pull no punches as they go head to head with best man Adam and bridesmaid Laura to relive their knockout, boxing-themed wedding from 2016

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and a couple's relationship might be over before it has begun

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the £1,000 prize in Swindon, where Carla and Hayley kick off the competition by serving up a spicy Caribbean-themed menu for food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and lovebirds Tim and Kath. However, spice-loving Carla causes upset by revealing she plans on bringing her own hot pepper sauce to the other couples' dinner parties

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With Decision Day looming, the couples prepare for the biggest call of their lives, questioning love, trust and authenticity in the process. One wife is blindsided by life-changing news

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley turns 21, so the adults hit a bar, where Claire is desperate to appear more of a pal than a nagging, uptight mum, and Cameron and Mitchell are distressed when their 'cool' credentials come up short. Phil and Jay's quick pitstop to buy a present takes a disastrous turn, too, while back at home, Alex, Manny and Luke are left to babysit Lily

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Manny are on their way back from breakfast at the pancake house when Phil is forced to swerve out of the way of an oncoming truck, a brush with death that prompts them all to re-evaulate their lives. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An irreverent take on the Prince and the Pauper. Bart enthusiastically trades lives with wealthy lookalike Simon Woosterfield after landing himself in trouble. Simon settles into life at home with the Simpsons, but Bart finds the lavish lifestyle too much to handle when he becomes the target of all his new friends' pranks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes it his mission to find a devastated Smithers a boyfriend and signs him up to a dating app. Lisa gets a leading role in the school production of Casablanca, leaving Milhouse jealous of her co-star and Bart plotting sabotage. Guest starring George Takei

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa on a theatre trip to the big city to make up for a rough patch in their relationship. Bart is frustrated that everyone seems to be well prepared for his pranks in advance, so he teams up with Maggie to play practical jokes on unsuspecting victims

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa takes a trip to the mall to buy a new gadget, while Bart manages to cause chaos. After making a hasty retreat, he befriends a boy named Bashir - but Homer begins to believe that his son's new pal is involved in a terrorist plot

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad has time to kill when the arrival of the Serbian president's motorcade to Brooklyn is delayed, so Peralta launches the seventh annual Jimmy Jab Games, an eccentric series of races and contests held in the precinct building. Meanwhile, Jeffords and Holt must set up a new drug task force approved by Holt's nemesis, Madeline Wuntch

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: It's Halloween again, and this time Peralta bets Holt he can steal his treasured watch before midnight, enlisting criminal assistance to achieve his goal. Gina struggles to keep up with her college course, perform a full-time job and attend dance rehearsals - leading to problems both in and out of work

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: There is scepticism, competition and high emotions when Gloria wins a bid at the school auction for a family seminar with famous doctor and author Debra Radcliffe, whose self-help book, Clean Out Your Junk Drawer, encourages people to get out all their emotional junk to become healthier people and better partners and spouses

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Gloria rents a cabin in the mountains in which she hopes she and her family will be able to enjoy a picture-perfect white Christmas. However, when the clan arrives, unhelpful weather and a random eccentric guest conspire to ruin the festive cheer. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam resolve to make up for their bad carolling experience last year, and Jay has a huge announcement that catches Claire off-guard. Comedy, starring Sofia Vergara

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The American comedy returns after a mid-series break. Jay struggles with the age gap between the parents of Joe's latest play date, while Cam he tries to act as matchmaker between Lily and her crush, only to discover that he's completely misunderstood the direction of her affections. Elsewhere, Claire and Phil attempt to split the bill with cheque-dodging friends on a double date, and Haley, Alex and Luke run into Goodfellas star Ray Liotta while searching for a last-minute birthday surprise for Mitchell

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Fed up with having the ducklings around the house, Claire and the kids hatch a secret plan to help them fly the nest. Meanwhile, Jay helps out Mitchell when he throws a slumber party for Lily's Vietnamese dance troupe and Gloria and Manny are forced to stage a hot pepper heist when a huge sauce order comes in

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge starts her own sandwich shop after her snacks become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. However, running a business proves challenging - especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Eco-disaster looms in Springfield when Mr Burns launches a controversial fracking operation - and while Homer is more than happy to play accomplice to his boss, an outraged Lisa calls on the services of bigshot politician Maxine Lombard (voiced by two-time Oscar winner Jane Fonda) to shut Burns down. Against the odds, however, the opponents end up falling for one another

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: In a crossover episode with Futurama, the Planet Express crew members travel back in time and turn up in Springfield on a mission to prevent the troublesome family from destroying the future. It's not just a question of asking nicely however - Bender has been programmed to kill Bart, Terminator-style. Can the clan foil the murderous bot?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a bullying new teacher who seems to want to crush his spirit, so the spiky-haired tearaway becomes determined to fight back. Meanwhile, the family attends a hippie-style community festival. With the guest voice of Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Beth sets in motion a plan that sends shockwaves through feuding families, and Mercedes has a life-altering decision to make

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A particularly bad episode of Itchy & Scratchy prompts Bart and Lisa to write their own script and send it to the show's producer under Grampa's name. With the voice of Brooke Shields

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The regular gaggle of family and friends share their thoughts on shows including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown, Family Fortunes, Mammals, Love Is Blind and This Morning

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Charity worker Freddie, who's 27, is set up on a date with 22-year-old fashion buyer Rebecca, hoping that she will be the girl who will be able to get his unique sense of humour. Meanwhile, 36-year-old Army medic Lyn meets Steve, a 38-year-old ex-Army engineer, but the date takes an interesting turn when she reveals that she is pregnant. Elsewhere, 52-year-old Jazz singer Gina is set up with 57-year-old singer-songwriter Nik, and food buyer Cindy from Leeds goes on a date with sales representative Elan

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the dating show. This time, 30-year-old Stephanie, a self-confessed 'dating disaster', and 88-year-old Bethany, a free-spirited artist from Essex, choose a date from a selection of six naked people

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Dental nurse Jade, who's 25, is set up on a date with handsome tree surgeon Tom. Meanwhile, Sharran - the UK's only female sumo wrestler - meets David, a former bingo-caller, who has been unlucky in love in the past, and City trader Adam is set up on a date with 28-year-old party girl Leena from Liverpool

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Charity worker Freddie, who's 27, is set up on a date with 22-year-old fashion buyer Rebecca, hoping that she will be the girl who will be able to get his unique sense of humour. Meanwhile, 36-year-old Army medic Lyn meets Steve, a 38-year-old ex-Army engineer, but the date takes an interesting turn when she reveals that she is pregnant. Elsewhere, 52-year-old Jazz singer Gina is set up with 57-year-old singer-songwriter Nik, and food buyer Cindy from Leeds goes on a date with sales representative Elan

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly replaces Murray's favourite chair with a new one without consulting him first, causing him to go on the warpath. Adam becomes tired of being picked on during the bus ride to school, but soon comes to regret enlisting Barry to help fend off the bully

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray intervenes when Adam asks Beverly to help him avoid the humiliation of taking a national physical fitness test at school. Meanwhile, Erica decides to have some fun at Barry's expense when he tries to woo her French pen pal

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Jai and Leanne, best man Pells and father of the bride Bruce look back at their unforgettable 'sky high' wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with a plumber. Meanwhile, the tremor causes Manny to experience an existential crisis, and Mitchell struggles to remain calm. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane (The Producers)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In an episode inspired by Hitchcock thriller Strangers on a Train, Claire and Mitchell agree to be brutally honest with each other's partners - so Phil is informed his stand-up comedy is cringeworthy, and Cam is told his decision to wear biker shorts is unwise. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, civil partners Andrew and David serve up a 'ritzy' affair for their guests, but their food gets a mixed reaction. On the second night, hosts Emma and Richard face a grilling over their use of shop-bought ingredients. Meanwhile, Richard and Joey's 'bromance' develops when they feed each other heart-shaped strawberries. Last to host are newlyweds Joey and Hannah, who serve basic wholesome food, but argue over the size of their fishcakes

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone heads to Jay and Gloria's when a huge storm causes a power cut, although so many people in such close quarters can only spell trouble

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire manages to easily balance running Jay's closet business with her domestic tasks, but she might be exploiting a secret weapon. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam are snubbed at their friends' wedding, leaving them to wonder what they might have done to deserve such rude treatment. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simon Cowell provides the voice of the sharp-tongued administrator of a nursery for gifted children who has the job of deciding whether to accept Maggie. As the possibility of successful admission becomes more likely, Lisa feels her position as the intelligent one in the family is being threatened

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Reviews of The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne, Mammals, You Won't Believe This and Help! My House Is Haunted

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 30-year-old Pablo, who is HIV positive and hopes to break the stigma about his condition, and Leon, a musician and rapper from Burnley, take part

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry hosts a 'no parents allowed' birthday party for Adam, instead of the laser tag party that was originally planned. He hopes to help his little brother get his first kiss with Dana, but his action sparks some surprisingly protective instincts in Erica. Comedy, starring Troy Gentile and Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The regular gaggle of family and friends share their thoughts on shows including I'm a Celebrity, Get Me Out of Here!, The Great British Bake Off, The Crown, Family Fortunes, Mammals, Love Is Blind and This Morning

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on various show from the past week, including Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Jamie's £1 Wonders, Top Gear, Guillermo del Toro's Cabinet of Curiosities, Drink Masters, Wild Croc Territory, plus the woman marrying a ghost on This Morning and BBC News reporting on the-then new 50p coin. First shown in November 2022

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With Decision Day looming, the couples prepare for the biggest call of their lives, questioning love, trust and authenticity in the process. One wife is blindsided by life-changing news

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he meets husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who reveal a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faces the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company, but can he get through to this defiant pair?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer and Marge remember the ups and downs of their marriage through a series of flashbacks, including the time they each began flirting with guests at a glamorous party - a situation that led to a food fight and an unexpected swim in the pool

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Erica join Adam and his friends Emmy, Dana and Chad on a treasure hunt inspired by the Goonies when Pops misplaces some family jewels and Beverly threatens to reorganise his financial affairs if he fails to find them. Comedy, starring Jeff Garlin and Wendi McLendon-Covey

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray struggles to get Adam interested in hockey, but he doesn't enjoy the sport and fakes enthusiasm to please his father. Beverly tries to help Erica prepare for her college entrance exams, but her plans threaten to backfire when she does the job too well

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Danielle and Jordan pull no punches as they go head to head with best man Adam and bridesmaid Laura to relive their knockout, boxing-themed wedding from 2016

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and a couple's relationship might be over before it has begun

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sheep

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the £1,000 prize in Swindon, where Carla and Hayley kick off the competition by serving up a spicy Caribbean-themed menu for food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and lovebirds Tim and Kath. However, spice-loving Carla causes upset by revealing she plans on bringing her own hot pepper sauce to the other couples' dinner parties

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Denver, Colorado, where he meets the stubborn owner of Italian restaurant Pantaleone's, who appears to be firmly stuck in the past. Pete maintains he makes the best pizza in town - based on a review from the 1980s - but the fiery chef's own taste test proves the opposite. With Pete's wife Paulette and son Josh threatening to leave, can Gordon get through to him and save the business?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Arvada, Colorado, where a husband and wife have allowed their restaurant to fall into disrepair. Randy's hoarding is out of control, while Alexa, who runs the kitchen, has a lot to learn. To make matters worse, the Old Neighborhood is one of the filthiest eateries the fiery chef has ever seen, and only one of the biggest transformations of the series can save the business

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With Decision Day looming, the couples prepare for the biggest call of their lives, questioning love, trust and authenticity in the process. One wife is blindsided by life-changing news

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley turns 21, so the adults hit a bar, where Claire is desperate to appear more of a pal than a nagging, uptight mum, and Cameron and Mitchell are distressed when their 'cool' credentials come up short. Phil and Jay's quick pitstop to buy a present takes a disastrous turn, too, while back at home, Alex, Manny and Luke are left to babysit Lily

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys and Manny are on their way back from breakfast at the pancake house when Phil is forced to swerve out of the way of an oncoming truck, a brush with death that prompts them all to re-evaulate their lives. Comedy, starring Ty Burrell

programme.desc: Charity worker Freddie, who's 27, is set up on a date with 22-year-old fashion buyer Rebecca, hoping that she will be the girl who will be able to get his unique sense of humour. Meanwhile, 36-year-old Army medic Lyn meets Steve, a 38-year-old ex-Army engineer, but the date takes an interesting turn when she reveals that she is pregnant. Elsewhere, 52-year-old Jazz singer Gina is set up with 57-year-old singer-songwriter Nik, and food buyer Cindy from Leeds goes on a date with sales representative Elan

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Beverly replaces Murray's favourite chair with a new one without consulting him first, causing him to go on the warpath. Adam becomes tired of being picked on during the bus ride to school, but soon comes to regret enlisting Barry to help fend off the bully

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray intervenes when Adam asks Beverly to help him avoid the humiliation of taking a national physical fitness test at school. Meanwhile, Erica decides to have some fun at Barry's expense when he tries to woo her French pen pal

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Jai and Leanne, best man Pells and father of the bride Bruce look back at their unforgettable 'sky high' wedding in 2016

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: An earthquake strikes, leaving Claire stuck in the bathroom with a plumber. Meanwhile, the tremor causes Manny to experience an existential crisis, and Mitchell struggles to remain calm. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane (The Producers)

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: In an episode inspired by Hitchcock thriller Strangers on a Train, Claire and Mitchell agree to be brutally honest with each other's partners - so Phil is informed his stand-up comedy is cringeworthy, and Cam is told his decision to wear biker shorts is unwise. Comedy, starring Julie Bowen and Jesse Tyler Ferguson

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Wiltshire, civil partners Andrew and David serve up a 'ritzy' affair for their guests, but their food gets a mixed reaction. On the second night, hosts Emma and Richard face a grilling over their use of shop-bought ingredients. Meanwhile, Richard and Joey's 'bromance' develops when they feed each other heart-shaped strawberries. Last to host are newlyweds Joey and Hannah, who serve basic wholesome food, but argue over the size of their fishcakes

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Queens, New York, where he meets a family torn apart by the stress of running failing Greek restaurant Kati Allo. Husband-and-wife owners Manny and Christine are on the brink of divorce, while their daughter Evelyn is caught in the middle and at her wits' end

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of Mangia Mangia, an Italian restaurant with an identity crisis in Woodland Park, Colorado, where guests have a choice between casual fine-dining service or a pick-up from the drive-through takeaway. Hard-nosed owner Julie finds herself completely at odds with the head chef, forcing her to breaking point

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It is Decision Day in Austin, and the final reckoning for the newlyweds. The stakes have never been higher as the couples face the ultimate decision - do they stay married or walk away for good?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Valentine's Day arrives, which for the Dunphys means their chance to dress up and romance each other as their once-a-year role-play characters Clive and Juliana - although Claire begins to worry that Phil prefers her like this. Meanwhile, Jay's romantic plans hit a snag in the sassy form of Gloria's sister Sonia, who ends up trying to seduce him, and wires are crossed when Mitch and Cam find themselves in a sticky situation with pal Anders

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The Dunphys are flying home from a weekend away, but Phil is less than happy when Claire takes the only first-class seat available. Mitch and Cam throw a belated baby shower for their friend Sal, and are surprised to find that motherhood seems to have changed her, and Jay shows Manny how to defend himself against a bully in his cooking class. Elizabeth Banks, Nathan Lane and Penn Jillette guest star

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Mr Burns wins a professional basketball team in a poker game at the annual billionaires' retreat. He decides to build a state-of-the-art stadium in an effort to lure fans, but the proposed site is on the last remaining bee colony in Springfield - prompting Lisa to lead a protest

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa lets her imagination run wild when she makes a new friend and they create a magical kingdom together called Equalia, complete with characters and plotlines. But they find themselves facing a nightmare when the boundaries between reality and fantasy become blurred. With the voice of Emily Blunt

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is distressed to learn that Lenny and Carl fixed the result of a senior class presidential election, which he lost in high school - leading him to speculate on how his life would have changed for the better had he won the ballot

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Principal Skinner takes the school's underachieving pupils on a trip to ensure they miss a standard test and unexpectedly finds himself rediscovering his enthusiasm for teaching. Paranoia stalks Homer after he forgets to pay the family's insurance bill and leaves him trying to prevent a host of imaginary catastrophes

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: When an Internal Affairs investigator reveals there may be a mole in the precinct, Peralta and Holt must find out who it is before Deputy Chief Wuntch gets wind of the situation. Jeffords and Diaz visit a silent disco to uncover leads for their new drug task force

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta hits it off with Sophia, a woman he meets in a bar, only to find out she is the defence attorney representing a perpetrator he is trying to put behind bars. Diaz pressures Santiago to stand as a union rep, while Gina and Boyle try to move on from their relationship. Eva Longoria (best known as Desperate Housewives' Gaby) joins the cast

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Luke hold Claire back as she tries to declutter, Cameron panics when Jay decides to take up a new hobby and Gloria tries her hand at golf

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay is jealous streak when a lifesize advert featuring Gloria starts attracting unsavoury attention from other men, so he and Manny hatch a plan to steal it. Meanwhile, Cam and Mitch turn on the charm as they try to garner better reviews for their rental property, but they can't help but spy when their new tenants start acting strangely

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone heads to Jay and Gloria's when a huge storm causes a power cut, although so many people in such close quarters can only spell trouble

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire manages to easily balance running Jay's closet business with her domestic tasks, but she might be exploiting a secret weapon. Meanwhile, Mitch and Cam are snubbed at their friends' wedding, leaving them to wonder what they might have done to deserve such rude treatment. Comedy, guest starring Nathan Lane

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer finds himself caught in the throes of a midlife crisis, so he takes up bass guitar and forms a band with some of the other dads in Springfield. However, things get awkward when their singer - none other than Apu - proves so successful that he quickly outgrows the rest of the group, leading to jealousy and resentment

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: Homer gets into the spirit of the season during a Christmas Eve session at Moe's, and after getting a tad too merry he is told not to come home by an angry Marge. Wandering around Springfield all on his own, the lovable oaf is left to think about his actions - but will he see the error of his ways?

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: Homer and Marge take the kids to Diz-Nee Land, where they soon become exasperated by the amusement park's lengthy queues, until they discover a ride that transports them to the home planet of Kang and Kodos

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer makes a connection with Bart after being hypnotised into thinking he is a 10-year-old boy by hypnotist Svenjamin Ghali, leading to the pair embarking on a series of mischievous adventures. Animated comedy capers with the family, in a story penned by Hollywood writer and producer Judd Apatow

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Simon Cowell provides the voice of the sharp-tongued administrator of a nursery for gifted children who has the job of deciding whether to accept Maggie. As the possibility of successful admission becomes more likely, Lisa feels her position as the intelligent one in the family is being threatened

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the town's annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: It has been 18 months since a shocking Decision Day left everyone speechless. The brides and grooms reunite and reflect on their MAFS experience

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The sofa-critics watch The Crown, I'm a Celebrity? Get Me Out Of Here!, You Won't Believe This, Down to Earth with Zac Efron, This Morning with Marie Kondo, The Hidden Lives of Pets, and ITV News and the World Cup

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Reviews of The Traitors, I'm a Celebrity... Get Me Out of Here!, Michael McIntyre's The Wheel, Planet Sex with Cara Delevingne, Mammals, You Won't Believe This and Help! My House Is Haunted

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. This time, 30-year-old Pablo, who is HIV positive and hopes to break the stigma about his condition, and Leon, a musician and rapper from Burnley, take part

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson hosts the show in which potential dates bare all bit by bit in a bid to prove they are the one. First up is 30-year-old woman Emmy-Lou from Brighton, who has appeared on the show twice before, both times in the pod. Now she is back as the picker, unaware she is in for a big surprise. She is followed by 20-year-old Charlie from Oxford, a forensics student who hopes to find his ideal partner in crime

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: A look at what happened after Gordon Ramsay headed to Scottsdale, Arizona, where he met husband-and-wife bistro owners Samy and Amy Bouzaglo, who revealed a shocking contempt for customer feedback. The chef faced the biggest challenge of the series to save Amy's Baking Company - and a media furore unfolded after the episode was broadcast

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry hosts a 'no parents allowed' birthday party for Adam, instead of the laser tag party that was originally planned. He hopes to help his little brother get his first kiss with Dana, but his action sparks some surprisingly protective instincts in Erica. Comedy, starring Troy Gentile and Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives
programme.desc: Guy Fieri travels to viewers' favourites spots, including a burger joint in North Carolina, a grilled cheese sandwich diner in Ohio and a British pub in Texas

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge gives advice on making a casual weekday supper for sharing around the kitchen table with friends or family. She prepares a Mediterranean platter of houmous, breadsticks, roasted vegetables and tomato and mozzarella salad, as well as lamb dhansak, cottage pie topped with dauphinoise potatoes, and a pasta dish that takes just 15 minutes. She also shows to make elderflower cordial and a crunchy apple crumble

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge demonstrates recipes for an outdoor summer lunch, including salmon fillets with herb sauce, ham with home-made chutney, and fillet of beef with garlic and mustard cream. To accompany the cold meats and fish, Mary prepares two salads - one with fiery red rice, and the other featuring broad bean and little gem - and finishes off by making a summer pudding
